notes: Level 7 manual review override shard for spell indexes 15-19 in generated discovery row order.

This packet added structured/runtime mechanics for Prismatic Spray's ray table, Project Image's illusion controls, Regenerate's recurring healing, Resurrection's revive/ordeal rules, and Reverse Gravity's forced movement.

prismatic-spray::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The primary Dexterity save, damage rays, status rays, and teleport ray are represented as effects/options, but runtime lacks first-class random per-target ray resolution and tracked secondary save counters for Indigo/Violet.
prismatic-spray::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add random effect table and secondary save progression fields.
prismatic-spray::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime randomEffectTable plus secondarySaveTrack data for three-success/three-failure and next-turn save outcomes.

project-image::choice_or_mode.issue: Placement, movement, speaking/gesturing, behavior, and examination outcomes are represented as utility options.
project-image::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.

project-image::vision_light_sound.issue: Look/sound mimicry and hollow/noise transparency after discovery are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class illusion sight/sound channel and altered-audio-after-discovery fields.
project-image::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion sensory channel and discovered-audio-state fields.
project-image::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionSensoryChannels and discoveredIllusionAudio data.

project-image::illusion_or_disguise.issue: Intangibility, physical-interaction reveal, Study action Investigation reveal, and see-through-on-discovery are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks typed illusion reveal/pass-through/discernment fields.
project-image::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion interaction and reveal-test fields.
project-image::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionRevealTest and illusionPassThrough data.

project-image::sensor_or_remote_percepti.issue: Seeing through the illusion's eyes and hearing through its ears is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class remote-sensor perception fields.

project-image::message_or_communication.issue: The image can speak and behave as the caster chooses, but runtime lacks first-class remote speech/gesture communication fields.
project-image::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add projected speech and gesture control fields.

project-image::conditional_ending.issue: The image disappears and the spell ends if it takes any damage; runtime preserves this in utility options but lacks a typed damage-to-illusion end trigger.
project-image::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created illusion damage/end trigger fields.

regenerate::repeat_save_or_recurring_che.issue: The recurring 1 Hit Point at the start of each target turn is represented by a HEALING effect with turn_start trigger.
regenerate::repeat_save_or_recurring_che.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional recurring field required for this pass.

regenerate::healing_or_restoration.issue: Initial healing, recurring healing, and severed body-part regrowth are represented by HEALING effects and utility options.
regenerate::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional healing field required for this pass.
regenerate::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by HEALING effects and UTILITY controlOptions.

regenerate::object_stats_or_damageabilit.issue: The detector matched severed body parts; runtime preserves regrowth in utility options but lacks first-class body-part restoration fields.

resurrection::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The target's -4 D20 Test penalty and the caster's Disadvantage on D20 Tests for long-dead revivals are preserved in utility/status text, but runtime lacks typed D20-test penalty/disadvantage fields outside attack rolls.
resurrection::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add D20 Test penalty and caster-tax disadvantage fields.
resurrection::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime d20TestModifier and casterTaxModifier data.

resurrection::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: The detector matched Hit Points and restored body parts; return with all Hit Points is represented by HEALING and body restoration is preserved in utility options.
resurrection::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by HEALING effect and UTILITY controlOptions.

resurrection::status_or_state_change.issue: Revival, poison neutralization, wound closure, missing part restoration, target ordeal, and caster tax are represented in HEALING/STATUS_CONDITION/UTILITY, but runtime lacks first-class revive eligibility, poison neutralization, and caster spellcasting lockout fields.
resurrection::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add revive eligibility/restoration and caster tax fields.
resurrection::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime reviveEligibility, deathStateRestoration, and casterSpellcastingLockout data.

reverse-gravity::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Dexterity save to grab a reachable fixed object and avoid the upward fall is represented by the MOVEMENT effect condition and utility option.
reverse-gravity::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.
reverse-gravity::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT condition.saveType/saveEffect and UTILITY controlOptions.

reverse-gravity::movement_or_repositioni.issue: Upward fall, hover at the cylinder top, and downward fall when the spell ends are represented by MOVEMENT effects and utility options.
reverse-gravity::movement_or_repositioni.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional movement field required for this pass.
reverse-gravity::movement_or_repositioni.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT effects and UTILITY controlOptions.

reverse-gravity::terrain_or_surface.issue: Anchored objects, reachable fixed objects, and ceilings affect the upward fall; runtime preserves this in utility options but lacks first-class anchored/fixed-object collision and grab-surface fields.
reverse-gravity::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add anchored/fixed-object interaction fields for gravity and fall effects.
reverse-gravity::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime anchoredObjectInteraction and grabSurfaceEligibility data.

reverse-gravity::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched the area-triggered gravity reversal; this is forced movement/environmental control, not a ward or alarm.

reverse-gravity::environmental_change.issue: Gravity reversal is represented by MOVEMENT/UTILITY effects, but runtime lacks a first-class gravity direction/environmental force field.

reverse-gravity::conditional_ending.issue: The downward fall when the spell ends is represented by a MOVEMENT effect with on_exit_area trigger and utility option.
reverse-gravity::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional conditional-ending field required for this pass.
reverse-gravity::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT effect and UTILITY controlOptions.

reverse-gravity::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The detector matched end-of-spell downward fall, which is represented as movement rather than an aftermath or memory mechanic.
